Motion To Compel Caa Sports Llcs Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One, Special Interrogatories, Set One And Two, And Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, With Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-10-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Gene Halavanau, Esq. (415.692.5301; gene@halavanau.com) for Plaintiff.
Summer Smith, Esq. (415.352.2700; summer.smith@bullivant.com) for Defendant.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

The Court noted it did not receive compliance of tentative ruling rule to contest the matter.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BRUNILDA MCGRATH's Motion To Compel CAA Sports LLC's Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One, Special Interrogatories, Set One And Two, And Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, With Request For Sanctions:

Plaintiff's motion to compel responses to Form Interrogatories, Set One, Special Interrogatories, Sets One and Two, and Request for Production of Documents, Set One, from Defendant CAA Sports LLC is granted as requested - no opposition filed. CAA Sports LLC is ordered to provide code-compliant responses to Plaintiff's Form Interrogatories, Set One, Special Interrogatories, Sets One and Two, and Request for Production of Documents, Set One, without objections, within 30 days of service of notice of entry of the order. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is also granted. Defendant CAA Sports LLC is ordered to pay sanctions in the amount of $1,500 to Plaintiff within 30 days of service of notice of entry of the order.

Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
